ddls:
CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the author */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the author */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the author */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography or description of the author */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the author record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the author record */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes in the author record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "affiliations" (
  "affiliation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each affiliation */,
  "affiliation_name" TEXT /* Name of the affiliation */,
  "affiliation_type" TEXT /* Type of the affiliation (e.g., university, research institute) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the affiliation */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the affiliation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the affiliation record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the affiliation record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("affiliation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "author_affiliations" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "affiliation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the affiliation */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the author started the affiliation */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the author ended the affiliation */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or role of the author within the affiliation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the affiliation record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the affiliation record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id", "affiliation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, author, researcher) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the user record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
